name: edge-tooling
description: Claude Code plugins for OpenShift and edge computing workflows

plugins.name: challenge
plugins.description: Adversarial hypothesis reviewer — systematically attacks theories and root cause analyses to find weaknesses before they find you

plugins.name: edge-ocp-ci
plugins.description: Edge OCP Payload Monitor — monitor OpenShift nightly payloads for edge topology (SNO/TNA/TNF) failures with AI-enriched analysis

plugins.name: edge-scrum
plugins.description: Agents, skills, and workflows relevant to scrum process management for the OpenShift Edge Team

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub workflow skills — PR automation, labeling, and queue management

plugins.name: hello-world
plugins.description: A simple hello-world plugin demonstrating the marketplace plugin structure

plugins.name: lvms
plugins.description: LVMS (Logical Volume Manager Storage) release, QE, and operational workflows

plugins.name: mcp-atlassian
plugins.description: Atlassian Jira MCP server for Claude Code — provides Jira tools via the mcp-atlassian container image

plugins.name: microshift-release
plugins.description: Set of tools to perform MicroShift Release Testing activities

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: PR lifecycle toolkit — vet findings, triage CodeRabbit reviews, filter noise, and autonomous yolo-agent for CI monitoring and auto-fixes

plugins.name: threat-model
plugins.description: Analyze PRs for security threats with STRIDE/DFD analysis, MITRE ATT&CK and OWASP mapping for OpenShift edge topologies (TNA, TNF, SNO, LVMS)

plugins.name: two-node
plugins.description: Two-node topology (TNA/TNF) workflow automation — RHEL verification, Jira integration, and more

plugins.name: edge-ic
plugins.description: Individual contributor workflow automation for TODO management, status reporting, and Jira updates

plugins.name: skills-review
plugins.description: Lint SKILL.md files for quality, correctness, and adherence to skill guidelines
